post.description:
## Overview

Refund request enable you to reimburse a charge that was previously generated but remains unreimbursed. The funds will be returned to the initial payment method used for the charge.

### Callback
Once the sale is refunded successfully, we will update the marketplace with the sale details with a POST request of type `x-www-form-urlencoded` to the marketplace Callback URL.

#### Note:
You can refund multiple times per sale as long as you do not exceed the total amount of the sale. 
If you do not send the `sale_refund_amount' parameter, the sale will be fully refunded.

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

sale_refund_amount.description:
**Used only for partial refunds**, for a full refund exclude this attribute.
For example:
if the amount is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that recieved is 5075.
Note that the minimum value is 500.

language.description: Changes the error message language to English.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error).

refunded_from_creditcard.description: Return true if seller has not enough money for refund and we complete the refund from the seller credit card.

sale_invoice_url.description: Sale invoice URL, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel.

sale_refund_buffer.description: The refund buffer of this sale.

payme_transaction_total.description: The refund amount that the buyer will get.

payme_transaction_total_aft_deduction.description: The amount that the seller will be charge on.

post.description:
## Overview

In order to initiatea void for an authorization, you will be able to do so using the same API call for a refund. 

In order to be eligible for a void, the request must be initiated for:

1. Sale type must be authorization
2. The amount required to be voided must be the equal to amount requested and authorized initially.


#### Sale Types
You can find all the sale statuses [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/nznlk59rribo5-sale-statuses).

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

language.description: Changes the error message language to English.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error).

refunded_from_creditcard.description: Return true if seller has not enough money for refund and we complete the refund from the seller credit card.

sale_invoice_url.description: Sale invoice URL, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel.

sale_refund_buffer.description: The refund buffer of this sale.

payme_transaction_total.description: The refund amount that the buyer will get.

payme_transaction_total_aft_deduction.description: The amount that the seller will be charge on.

post.description:
## Overview

This endpoint enable you to execute the sale after authorization (`generate-sale` with `sale_type` = "authorize").

For more information, go to the [Capture Sale (Authorization) Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/5hztg1usesrsf-capture-sale-authorization).

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error)

sale_created.description: The date the sale was created (timestamp)

payme_sale_status.description: Sale status. You can find all the sale statuses [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/ort17682q5o8a-sale-statuses).

sale_status.description: Sale status. You can find all the sale statuses [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/ort17682q5o8a-sale-statuses).

is_token_sale.description: Indicates if the sale paid with token.

buyer_card_is_foreign.description: Is the card foreign or domestic? (For IL Sellers only)

installments.description: Number of installments used for the payment

post.description:
## Overview This endpoint enable you to cancle a Multi Payment Page. Multi Payment Page enables payments on a single sale link, by multiple buyers.
You can find more information in our [Multi Payment Page Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/cij4imxt4y3z2-multi-payment-page).

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error).
Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error).

305.description: This operation cannot be completed due to an inappropriate sale status

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error).
